response:
```sql
WITH monthly_signups AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS new_users
    FROM users
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
)
SELECT 
    curr.month,
    curr.new_users,
    LAG(curr.new_users) OVER (ORDER BY curr.month) AS prev_month_users,
    ROUND(
        ((curr.new_users - LAG(curr.new_users) OVER (ORDER BY curr.month)) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(LAG(curr.new_users) OVER (ORDER BY curr.month), 0)), 
        2
    ) AS growth_rate_percent
FROM monthly_signups curr
ORDER BY curr.month;
```
